x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents for SPO enable autonomous orchestration of portfolio planning tasks including demand intake, scoring, and routing. Without AI Agents installed, automated portfolio workflows and multi-step AI-driven processes cannot be activated.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Now Assist AI Agents from the ServiceNow Store.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_de03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c94
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[AI Agents for SPO enable autonomous orchestration of portfolio planning tasks including demand intake, scoring, and routing. Without AI Agents installed, automated portfolio workflows and multi-step AI-driven processes cannot be activated.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>AI Agents Installed</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){ var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); sa.addQuery("scope","sn_aia"); sa.setLimit(1);sa.query(); if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist AI Agents is installed."}; return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist AI Agents (sn_aia) not installed."}; })()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SPO</module> <number>CHK0006197</number> <order/> <remediation_guidance>Install Now Assist AI Agents from the ServiceNow Store.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>de03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c94</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
